name: Falcom Saudi Equity ETF
summary:
The fund aims to provide investors with long term capital appreciation and growth. It passively invests in the listed Saudi equities in order to achieve the results that correspond to the performance of index.
 The fund invests at least 95% of its assets in Equity securities of companies that are Shariah-compliant, listed and traded on Tadawul in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

name: Falcom Petrochemical ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to replicate, net of expenses, the FALCOM Petrochemical index.
 The fund aims to provide investors with long term capital appreciation and growth. It passively invests in the listed Saudi equities of the Petrochemical sector in order to achieve the results that correspond to the performance of the index.

name: Alinma Saudi Government Sukuk Etf Fund - Short Maturity - Alinma Sukuk Fund
